title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
summary_full: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
summary_public: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
